title: Breaking Out of the False World
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Usopp, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Luffy, Nami as The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.
scene: The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WHAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The sky is breaking?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WHAT THE HELL IS THIS?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WAAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look!! The sky! It's coming from the Holy Temple!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: No... over there?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What's going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: EVERY- THING'S GOING TO HELL!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What the...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That means...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: UNBELIEV- ABLE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's a giant room!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't still be on that huge ship though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This isn't like any of the cabins they had.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What's up with this wire netting?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'll bet there's genuine giants this way...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is this whole place some kind of pet cage?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guys!! Are you there?! was that noise you?! Heeeelp Mee!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I can't believe that the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: UWaaaaA AGGH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm sooo glad to see you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: there, there, chopper.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: every- thing's gonna be okay_)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The collar was made of steel, I couldn't get it off...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was sure I was going to Dieeeeee!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You owe me for this hug.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is clearly a giant's room, so what's with all the human-sized clothing???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's cold! You were scared earlier too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We must've been dressed up like dolls...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still, this is some fine craftsmanship. This sun god must be very skilled...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There's so many of these blocks!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that whole country was made out of them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: that explains the horrible scent...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...from when we were grilling up the rabbit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It must have been all the plastic burning.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, check it out. From here, the view is never ending...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Wait!! It's see- through now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's like normal glass on this end.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What kind of magic mirror is this?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami-San, I volunteer to clean the ladies' room on the ship lat--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Don't you dare!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this is some kind of sick hobby?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The giant likes to watch the animals and people trapped in that block world?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's creepy. But this confirms we're on Elbaf, right? This is a real giant's room, so there must be a real giant island out there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: For real?! heck yeah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: How can you be so sure?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All we can really say is a giant's behind this.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We should escape. Where are the others?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be bad if the giant came back and caught us here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why not head back inside and squeeze the townspeople for some more information? They seemed a little weird, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's better to face them than risk a confrontation with a giant. Hey, are you listening, Luffy!!!

summary: This part advances the Arrival in Elbaf through 52 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
